temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A man with longish brown hair, wearing a red and blue plaid shirt over a dark t-shirt and jeans, walks down a narrow, dimly lit hallway. He holds a small hatchet in his right hand. The hallway has textured, yellowish walls and is flanked by two white French doors with glass panes. (Storyline: This opening shot introduces a character who appears to be on a mission, armed and moving with purpose through a domestic space.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A high-pitched, tense, and suspenseful musical score begins to play, building anticipation.)
(00:02-00:05) In a dark, snowy outdoor setting, a person in a grey sweatshirt and dark pants is buried up to their chest in a pile of snow next to a wooden structure. They struggle to dig themselves out, using their hands to clear away the snow. (Storyline: This scene abruptly shifts the context, showing a character in a state of distress and struggle, buried in the snow and trying to escape.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, high-pitched musical score continues, linking the two disparate scenes.)
